title: Kitchen Perfected E5610SS Large Grinder, Metal, 200 W, 70 Grams
features: ONE TOUCH OPERATION: The simple, one touch pulse design is effortless and efficient. With a single touch the grinder will begin, stopping only when you remove your hand. Not only easy, this feature ensures your safety as the blade will only start rotating when the lid is in place and pressed down.

MULTI-PURPOSE: In addition to perfectly grinding beans for your morning coffee, this Kitchen Perfected tool can be used in food preparation too! Use it to chop and grind a wide variety of wet or dry spice and herb ingredients.

EASY TO USE AND CLEAN: The stainless steel blade and cup are easily cleaned, with a transparent lid for clear visibility. The one touch activation will grind the spices or beans to your liking; simply hold the lid down longer for a smoother powder or less time for a courser finish.

POWERFUL COFFEE GRINDER: Equipped with an 200W motor this compact appliance will effortlessly grind your favourite coffee beans and turn them into powder. The ability to grind coffee beans as and when you need them will produce a fresh, delicious flavour and an aroma unlike any instant pre-ground coffee.
HERBS & SPICES: from hard spices like root ginger to soft corriander, mint or other herbs. This grinder is the perfect kitchen companion for wet or dry spices.
description: A compact yet powerful spice & coffee grinder equipped with an 200W motor that will effortlessly grind your favourite coffee beans for that Barista style taste in the comfort of your own home, or use to chop your favourite herns and spices. The one touch operation is easy to use for a fresh, delicious result everyday with an aroma unlike any instant pre-ground coffee. The lid has a safety device that will not allow operation until it is fully closed. With a single touch the grinder will begin, stopping only when you remove your hand. Not only easy, this feature ensures your safety as the blade will only start rotating when the lid is in place and the button is pressed. In addition to helping you make the perfect morning blend, this Kitchen Perfected appliance can be used for chopping and grinding a variety of dried ingredients, just think of all those freshly ground spices you can add to your favourite recipes! Designed to be user friendly the grinder features a stainless steel blade and cup that are easily cleaned, with a transparent lid for clear visibility. The one touch button will grind the spices, herbs or beans to your liking; simply hold the button down longer for a smoother powder like finish. Box Includes : 1 x Kitchen Perfected Coffee/ Grinder 1 x Instruction Manual
